<compiler>/tests/fixtures/node-fs-import/input.js:2:16: SLOPPYC_E_UNSUPPORTED_IMPORT_SPECIFIER: unsupported import specifier "node:fs"
  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/node-fs-import/input.js:2:16
   |
2 | import fs from "node:fs";
   |                ^^^^^^^^^
hint: Use documented named, unaliased imports from "sloppy", "sloppy/time", "sloppy/fs", "sloppy/crypto", or "sloppy/net"; Sloppy does not implement Node or npm resolution.
